pi_items.source: Confirmed via export_result.sh CSV path variable and verifier.py reading logic.
Confirmed via export_result.sh JSON path variable and verifier.py reading logic.
Confirmed via export_result.sh checking logic (if GREEN in z and d < 0.95: zone_logic_correct = False) and task description.
Confirmed via export_result.sh checking logic (if YELLOW in z and (d > 1.05 or d < 0.45): zone_logic_correct = False) and task description.
Confirmed via task description explicitly stating Stop the loop when distance drops below 0.4m.
Confirmed via verifier.py scoring logic which requires start_dist >= 1.4 for full points on approach distance.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to run a Python script in a CoppeliaSim environment to generate synthetic telemetry data. It has been verified that the expected output paths for the CSV and JSON files match the export and verification scripts. Furthermore, the distance thresholds (green > 1.0m, yellow 0.5m-1.0m, and starting distance >= 1.4m) exactly match the strict checks implemented in export_result.sh and verifier.py scoring logic.
